allow: PowerShell(if \(\(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Fpl\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\flutter_build.log"\)\) { Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Fpl\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\flutter_build.log" | Select-String -Pattern "Running|Compiling|assembled|deployed|error" | Select-Object -Last 20 } else { "Build log not found - build might still be running" })
PowerShell(Get-Item d:\\Topicos\\gestorVentas-api\\dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "dist folder exists, last modified: " + $_.LastWriteTime })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'd:\\Topicos\\app_flutter\\assets\\models\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName, $_.Length }; if \($null -eq \(Get-Item 'd:\\Topicos\\app_flutter\\assets\\models\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Host "Directorio no existe" })

PowerShell(Test-Path 'd:\\Topicos\\app_flutter\\assets\\models\\qwen2.5-3b-instruct-q4_k_m.gguf' ; if \(Test-Path 'd:\\Topicos\\app_flutter\\assets\\models\\qwen2.5-3b-instruct-q4_k_m.gguf'\) { Get-Item 'd:\\Topicos\\app_flutter\\assets\\models\\qwen2.5-3b-instruct-q4_k_m.gguf' | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="TamañoGB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB, 2\)}} } else { Write-Host "Archivo NO existe" })
